items.title: FIRST EDITION OF NAVAL COMMANDERS’ CONFERENCE-2026 COMMENCES AT NAU SENA BHAWAN, NEW DELHI
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence FIRST EDITION OF NAVAL COMMANDERS’ CONFERENCE-2026 COMMENCES AT NAU SENA BHAWAN, NEW DELHI Posted On: 15 APR 2026 10:22AM by PIB Delhi The Indian Navy Commanders’ Conference 01/2026 commenced at Nau Sena Bhawan on 14 Apr 2026 with an inaugural address by Adm Dinesh K Tripathi, Chief of the Naval Staff, to senior naval leadership, outstation Operational…

items.title: From Steam to Speed: The Ever-Evolving Journey of Railways
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau PIB Headquarters From Steam to Speed: The Ever-Evolving Journey of Railways Posted On: 15 APR 2026 12:21PM by PIB Delhi Key Takeaways Railways in India began with the first passenger train running between Bombay and Thane on 16 th April, 1853 . Evolving from early steam locomotives, railways have now achieved 99.6% electrification of the broad gauge network as of March 20…
